summary: Frontend testing of 8 UI/UX landing page fixes. All fixes verified on desktop. Found CRITICAL issue: chatbot button overlaps with 'Made with Emergent' badge on mobile (390x844) and overlaps with StickyMobileCTA on venue detail pages. Search functionality, navigation links, and responsive layout working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot toggle button overlaps with 'Made with Emergent' badge on mobile. Button position (bottom-6 = 24px from bottom) puts it at y=764-820, badge at y=798-818. They overlap by ~22px.
On venue detail pages, chatbot button (bottom-6) overlaps with StickyMobileCTA (bottom-[40px]). Button at y=764-820, CTA at y=735-804.

landing_page_load_desktop.details: Landing page loads without errors on desktop (1920x1080)

landing_page_load_mobile.details: Landing page loads without errors on mobile (390x844)

fix_1_hero_darker_overlay.details: Hero section has darker overlay (bg-[#080808] with gradient) - text is highly readable

fix_2_search_card_spacing.details: Search card has proper internal spacing (p-7 sm:p-9 lg:p-11), tabs and dropdowns have breathing room (mb-8, gap-5 sm:gap-6)

fix_3_venue_card_capacity.details: Featured venue cards show guest capacity (e.g., 50-1500, 50-600) alongside price in a separator row with Users icon

fix_4_venue_card_hierarchy.details: Venue cards show: 1) Name (bold), 2) Location with MapPin, 3) Price & Capacity row (border-t/b), 4) Amenities tags, 5) CTA button

fix_5_section_spacing.details: 11 major sections with increased vertical spacing (py-20 lg:py-28, py-14 lg:py-18)

fix_6_trust_badges.details: Trust badges have larger icons (w-14 h-14) in bordered containers (bg-[#F8F5ED] rounded-2xl border)

fix_7_city_cards.details: City cards have circular arrow indicator (w-8 h-8 rounded-full) and hover lift effect (hover:-translate-y-0.5)

fix_8_venue_type_cards.details: Venue type/category cards have hover lift (hover:-translate-y-1), show ChevronRight arrow on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100)

chatbot_overlap_mobile.details: Chatbot button at bottom-6 overlaps with Emergent badge on mobile viewport

chatbot_overlap_venue_detail.details: Chatbot button overlaps with StickyMobileCTA on venue detail pages on mobile

search_functionality.details: Search works - selecting Mumbai + Wedding + 100-250 guests navigates to /venues/search?city=Mumbai&event_type=Wedding&guests=100-250

mobile_header.details: Mobile header visible with Sign In and hamburger menu on 390px width

mobile_menu.details: Hamburger menu opens/closes correctly, shows Browse Venues, List Your Venue, Get Started

mobile_responsive.details: All sections render properly on mobile - search card stacked, header adapts, sections stack vertically

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: ChatBot.js line 65 - change chatbot button position from 'bottom-6' to 'bottom-[120px] lg:bottom-8' to avoid overlap with Emergent badge and StickyMobileCTA on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBot.js: Mobile position bottom-6 (24px) is too low - should be bottom-[120px] on mobile to clear both the 'Made with Emergent' badge (~20px) and StickyMobileCTA (positioned at bottom-[40px] with ~70px height)
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: 8 UI/UX fixes verified on desktop. Main issue: chatbot button position on mobile needs to be higher (bottom-[120px]) to avoid overlap with Emergent badge and StickyMobileCTA. All search functionality and navigation working. Featured venues API returns 4 venues with capacity data.
rca_of_the_issue: The chatbot button was moved from bottom-[120px] to bottom-6 but this causes overlap on mobile viewport (844px height). At bottom-6 (24px from bottom), the 56px button occupies y=764-820. The Emergent badge occupies y=798-818. The StickyMobileCTA (on venue pages) occupies y=735-804. Solution: Use responsive positioning - 'bottom-[120px] lg:bottom-8' to keep it high on mobile and normal on desktop.
